meta.title: Trust Center — yapt.
meta.description: Learn about the security, privacy and AI governance practices that protect your data on yapt.

hero.title: Security and compliance as a priority.
hero.subtitle: Learn about the security, privacy and AI governance practices that protect your data on yapt.

compliance.subtitle: Compliance
compliance.title: GDPR and international standards
compliance.description: Compliance with GDPR and preparation for international certifications.
features: Right to erasure (GDPR Delete) with dry-run mode
Data subject export (Data Portability)
Consent management by channel and purpose
Immutable audit logs with tenant isolation
Data impact assessment for AI usage
Data processing agreements for AI sub-processors

security.subtitle: Security
security.title: Layered protection
security.description: Multiple layers of security to protect your data and your customers.
features: Origin protection with restrictive validation
Multi-factor authentication (MFA/TOTP)
Rate limiting on sensitive endpoints
Cryptographic signature on Meta webhooks
Tokens and secrets in environment variables (zero hardcoded)
Sensitive information protected in production

infrastructure.subtitle: Infrastructure
infrastructure.title: Secure architecture by design
infrastructure.description: Secure architecture with native multi-tenant isolation.
features: Complete isolation between organizations on all tables
TLS encryption in transit (HTTPS mandatory)
Each organization fully isolated on every operation
Ultra-fast cloud processing
Daily automatic backup with 7-day retention
Real-time monitoring and alerts

aiGovernance.subtitle: AI Governance
aiGovernance.title: Responsible and transparent AI
aiGovernance.description: Full control over how artificial intelligence processes your customers' data.
features: Advisory mode: AI suggests, human executes (never direct mutation)
Complete audit trail of every LLM interaction
Full traceability of every AI interaction
Legal basis of consent per AI processing
Declared sub-processors (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google)
Personal data flagged in audit trail

Human need detection
Frictionless handoff
100% preserved context
Automatic return to AI

yavehTeam.title: The AI brain of yapt. Build your own agent team.

features: yaveh orchestrates all AI
yaTeam: create agents for customer service
yaTeam: create internal agents (team copilot)
Agents that ensure pipeline rhythm
Agents that evaluate deals automatically

Performance analysis per salesperson

Suggestions based on real data
Meeting Intelligence (meeting analysis)

memory.title: Your customer never has to repeat anything again.

Cross-time (6 months ago? Remembered with full context)
Cross-agent (Changed agents? Context goes with them)

Voice context feeds SuperMemory

ai.subtitle: yaveh AI
ai.title: The brain that orchestrates all intelligence.
ai.description: yaveh is the AI core of yapt. It understands context, decides actions and responds with your brand's personality. All with infinite memory, intelligent fallback and advisory mode — AI suggests, the human decides.
features: 40+ automatic actions: qualify, create deal, schedule, escalate
Enriched context: campaign, attribution, full history
Advisory mode: AI suggests, salesperson decides
Intelligent fallback: if one model fails, another takes over

team.subtitle: yaTeam
team.title: Build your own AI agent team. Train each one your way.
team.description: You have a powerful base model — and you train it with your rules. Define your qualifying questions, configure when the AI should consider a lead qualified, choose your sales playbook and adjust the personality. It's your sales process, codified in AI.
features: Train with your qualifying questions (BANT, SPIN, MEDDIC or custom)
Define the criteria: when the AI considers a lead qualified
7 specializations: SDR, Closer, Support, Scheduler, Engager, Analyst, Guardian
Configurable personality: formality, proactiveness, empathy
Smart handoff: AI → human with zero context loss

aiTeam.title: 8 types of AI. Each with its own mission.

sdr.name: SDR Agent

Describe your ICP and the AI evaluates each lead semantically
7 behavioral factors: engagement, recency, emotion, channel, deal and more
Hybrid mode: combines trained AI + behavior for a precise final score

knowledgeHub.description: Knowledge base integrated with AI — articles, FAQs and guides that AI consults automatically.

meta.title: Marketing & Campaigns — yapt.
meta.description: From ad to closed deal. yaCampaigns connects paid media to real revenue. Every dollar invested, every lead generated, every conversation — tracked from click to sale.

hero.title: From ad to closed deal. Fully tracked.
hero.subtitle: yaCampaigns connects paid media to real revenue. Every dollar invested, every lead generated, every conversation — tracked from click to sale.

statement.headline: yapt. is the only platform with real WhatsApp tracking.
statement.subtext: If it comes from a Meta or Google campaign — full tracking via native integration. If it comes from a landing page — iLeadway detects the campaign and we track 100% on WhatsApp.

painPoints.header: Different company, different industry, but the pain is always the same...

items.title: Unqualified leads
items.description: Campaigns go wrong and flood WhatsApp with unqualified leads. Your team wastes time on people who will never buy.

items.title: Irrelevant data
items.description: The ad manager delivers irrelevant information. Impossible to know which ad actually drives sales.

items.title: Hours in spreadsheets
items.description: Hours wasted filling spreadsheets because WhatsApp doesn't tell you which conversation became a sale.

items.title: Imprecise metrics
items.description: Ad manager data is imprecise and it's hard to optimize campaigns. You're investing in the dark.

campaigns.subtitle: yaCampaigns
campaigns.title: Campaign Intelligence: every dollar invested, tracked to the sale.
campaigns.description: Sync your Meta and Google Ads campaigns with yapt. Configure intelligence per campaign — expected ticket, product, target audience — and track real ROAS calculated with sales data, not estimates.
features: Automatic sync with Meta Ads + Google Ads
Campaign Intelligence: ticket, product and audience per campaign
Real ROAS calculated with sales data (not Meta estimates)
Dashboard with leads, conversions, revenue and cost per channel
Cross-attribution: know exactly which ad generated which sale

instantEngage.subtitle: Instant Engage
instantEngage.title: Lead filled out the form? WhatsApp arrives in under 30 seconds.
instantEngage.description: When a lead fills out a Meta form, yapt. fires a WhatsApp message automatically via official API. Configurable template per campaign, dynamic variables and 100% automatic attribution. The lead is still on the ad screen when they receive the message.
features: Lead Form → WhatsApp in <30 seconds, no intervention
Custom template per campaign with dynamic variables
Direct attribution: zero cookie or pixel dependency
Real-time status: sent, delivered, read
Works with Meta Lead Ads and Google Lead Forms

tracking.subtitle: Full Tracking
tracking.title: From any source. 100% tracking on WhatsApp.
tracking.description: Click-to-WhatsApp? Form? Landing page? No matter the source — yapt. tracks everything. Ad headline, creative, source URL, UTMs — 10 fields captured automatically. With iLeadway, even landing page leads enter WhatsApp with full attribution.
features: CTWA: headline, body, media and ad URL captured automatically
Lead Form: full campaign attribution per lead
Landing Page: iLeadway integration detects campaign and tracks on WA
UTM tracking: source, medium, campaign, term, content
Conversions API: send conversions back to Meta and Google (closed loop)

googleAds.subtitle: Google Ads
googleAds.title: The same Meta power. Now with Google.
googleAds.description: Connect your Google Ads campaigns with the same intelligence pipeline as Meta. Automatic sync, Instant Engage for Google Lead Forms and full attribution — all integrated into the same dashboard.
features: Simplified OAuth with Google Ads
Automatic campaign and metrics sync
Instant Engage works with Google Lead Forms
Same unified dashboard (Meta + Google side by side)
Cross-platform attribution

templates.subtitle: WhatsApp Templates
templates.title: Create, sync with Meta and measure results. All here.
templates.description: Visual template builder with dynamic variables. Automatically syncs with Meta. Analytics per template: sent, delivered, read, replied. A/B testing to discover which message converts more.
features: Visual builder with dynamic variables (name, product, price)
3 Meta categories: Marketing, Utility, Authentication
Automatic sync with Meta — without leaving yapt.
Analytics: sent, delivered, read, replied, per template
A/B testing: test variants and discover what converts

proposals.subtitle: Proposals
proposals.title: Proposal via WhatsApp. Customer accepts on mobile.
proposals.description: Send proposals via direct link on WhatsApp. The customer opens it on their phone, sees everything formatted, and accepts online. No PDF, no email, no middleman. Tracking: viewed, time spent, acceptance.
features: Proposal template builder (title, description, price, terms)
Public link — customer opens and accepts on mobile
Tracking: views, time on page, clicks, acceptances
Integrated with Deals — proposal linked to the deal
Versioning: proposal v1, v2, v3 with full history

capi.subtitle: Conversions API
capi.title: Closed loop. Conversions back to Meta and Google.
capi.description: Send real conversion events — qualified lead, proposal sent, deal closed — directly to Meta CAPI and Google Ads. The platform algorithms learn from real sales data, not estimates. Your campaigns optimize themselves.
features: Meta CAPI direct from server: zero pixel or cookie dependency
Google Ads Offline Conversions: import real sales
Customizable events: lead, qualification, proposal, sale
Optimized match rate: email, phone, fbclid, gclid
Campaigns self-optimize with real revenue data

hero.title: Your operation on autopilot.

inbox.subtitle: Inbox V2 — Smart Queue
inbox.title: Smart queue. Right priority.
inbox.description: 4 fixed views with automatic prioritization by score, emotion and SLA. The queue organizes itself — hot leads always first.
features: 4 views: My Inbox, Smart Queue (AI prioritizes), Open, Waiting
Lead Scoring (0-100): 7 behavioral factors calculated every 10 min
Sorting by SLA, priority, wait time or last activity
Emotion Engine: 13 emotional signals per message (frustration, urgency, hesitation)
Handler State: bot ↔ human control, pauses automation when agent takes over

routing.subtitle: yaOps — Routing
routing.title: 6 distribution modes. Zero lost leads.
routing.description: Round-robin, least-loaded, skill-based, by keyword, campaign or schedule. Sticky routing keeps the same agent. Overflow redirects automatically.
features: Round-robin with weight and capacity per agent
Least-loaded: sends to whoever has fewer conversations
Skill-based: route by language, product, region or certification
Sticky routing: keeps the agent for N days (no context loss)
Agent Pull: agent pulls from queue when ready
Overflow: if sector full, redirects automatically

sla.subtitle: SLA & Escalation
sla.title: SLA per sector. Automatic escalation.
sla.description: Set response and resolution times per sector. Timer visible in Inbox. When SLA is at risk, escalation automatically moves up the chain.
features: Response + resolution SLA configurable per sector
Visual timer in Inbox: green, yellow, red
Automatic escalation when deadline approaches
Business hours and holidays respected in calculation
Window Guardian: outside hours, alternative routing

monitor.subtitle: Agents Monitor
monitor.title: Full team visibility in real time.
monitor.description: Who's online, busy, on break. Used capacity vs available. Utilization per agent. All live, updated instantly.
features: Real-time status: online, busy, away, break, offline
Capacity: current conversations vs configured maximum
Utilization %: green (<50%), yellow (50-80%), red (>80%) indicators
Filters by status, sector or name search
Instant updates — no refresh needed

deals.subtitle: yaDeals

features: Visual kanban with drag-and-drop between stages
Multi-pipeline: sales, onboarding, CS — each with its own stages
Stakeholders: link multiple contacts to the same deal
SLA per stage: alerts when a deal is stuck
Win/Loss analysis: understand why deals are won or lost

calendar.description: Google Calendar sync, multi-seller view and scheduling integrated with deals.

activities.title: Activities Hub
activities.description: Tasks, calls, meetings and My Day — all centralized with reminders and deal linking.

proposals.title: Proposals
proposals.description: Visual editor, public link with view tracking and direct deal integration.

scoring.title: Hybrid Lead Scoring
scoring.description: 7 behavioral factors + AI. Score updates every 10 min and prioritizes your queue automatically.

emotion.title: Emotion Engine
emotion.description: 13 real-time emotional signals. Frustration redirects to senior agent automatically.

handoff.title: Bot ↔ Human
handoff.description: Managed handler state. Automations pause when agent takes over. Zero duplicate messages.

CSAT and NPS integrated into conversation flow
Conversion funnel: from lead to closed deal
Metrics by agent, channel, campaign and period

escalationChains.description: Inbox → Supervisor → Manager, with configurable timers and multi-channel notification (in-app, email, WhatsApp).

notifications.description: Each member configures their alerts by category and channel. Quiet hours to avoid disturbance after hours.

items.question: Can I try it before buying?
items.answer: Yes! We offer a personalized demo where you see yapt. working with real data from your scenario. Schedule a conversation with our team and understand how the platform fits your operation.

items.question: What is the setup timeline?
items.answer: Setup in up to 24 hours for Starter and Business plans. For Enterprise, onboarding is done with dedicated guidance and may include custom migrations and integrations.

items.question: Do I need a technical team?
items.answer: No. yapt. is no-code for configuration. AI agents, pipelines, campaigns and integrations are configured through a visual interface. For advanced API integrations, full documentation is available.

items.question: How does migration work?
items.answer: Our team handles the entire migration. We import contacts, conversation history and settings from your current tool. The transition is done without disrupting your service.

items.question: Is there a lock-in contract?
items.answer: No. Monthly plans with no lock-in. You can upgrade, downgrade or cancel at any time. We believe you stay because you want to, not because you have to.

hero.badge: by New Way — Meta Business Solution Provider
hero.tagline: The world's 1st AI Native Conversational Revenue Platform.
hero.title: Intelligent Conversations that Convert.
hero.description: AI-native conversational intelligence. Agents that sell. Mentors that level up teams. Artificial Intelligence with infinite memory.
hero.descriptionLine2: From ad click to closed deal.

problem.title: Your operation grows, but your intelligence doesn't.
problem.description: You invest in campaigns, hire agents, integrate tools — but the more you grow, the more fragmented your operation becomes. Without connected data, there is no intelligence. Without intelligence, there are no decisions.

cards.title: Invisible attribution
cards.description: Leads arrive, but nobody knows where from. Which campaign generated them? Which channel converted? Which ad performed? Without source traceability, every media investment is a shot in the dark.

cards.title: Chatbots and AIs that underdeliver
cards.description: Chatbots promise automation, but without customer context, interaction history or business data — AI doesn't qualify, doesn't resolve, doesn't sell. It just frustrates.

cards.title: Team operating in the dark
cards.description: The lead arrives and the salesperson doesn't know: where they came from, what they were looking for, which offer they saw, who they already spoke with. Without context, every interaction starts from zero. The opportunity cools. The sale is lost.

solution.title: One platform. One intelligence. Total visibility.
solution.subtitleAfter: your operation converses with intelligence, learns from every interaction, and delivers complete pipeline visibility — all in one place.

cards.title: Native Conversational AI
cards.description: Every conversation is guided by artificial intelligence that understands context, qualifies leads, and responds with your brand's personality — 24/7, without human intervention.

cards.title: Infinite Memory
cards.description: Every interaction, preference, and history is stored forever. The AI remembers who the lead is, what was discussed, and what the next step is — without repeating questions.

cards.title: Unified View
cards.description: WhatsApp, Instagram, Meta Ads, email — all channels converge into a single dashboard. See the entire pipeline, from acquisition to conversion, with real-time metrics.

blocks.title: Intelligence, not software
blocks.description: From emotions in conversations to management settings — everything is AI. It's not a chatbot bolted onto a legacy system. It's artificial intelligence that permeates every layer of your operation.

blocks.title: Agents that sell. Agents that train your team.
blocks.description: Incredible customer experience and operational efficiency for your team. AI agents serve, qualify and sell 24/7. Mentor agents work to increase your team's potential.

blocks.title: From ad to deal. Fully tracked.
blocks.description: Complete source attribution — know exactly which campaign, ad and creative generated each lead. Instant Engage captures in the first second. Conversion events go back to Meta Ads.

blocks.title: Automations with infinite memory
blocks.description: Event-driven, multi-agent, multi-knowledge. The AI knows everything that's happened with each lead and uses that complete history to decide the next step. No repetitions, no redundant questions.

blocks.title: Intelligence at enterprise scale
blocks.description: Conversational experiences that convert at scale. Intelligent distribution across teams, automations for complex journeys, 360° customer view and end-to-end attribution.

blocks.title: Intelligent pipeline with AI
blocks.description: CRM that fills itself — AI extracts data from conversations and suggests fields automatically. Manage opportunities from first contact to close. Real revenue predictability.

blocks.title: Security and compliance as a priority
blocks.description: Data protected with the highest standards. End-to-end encryption, automated backups, GDPR compliance. Granular permission control and complete audit trail.

journey.title: From first ad to closed deal. One journey, one platform.
journey.subtitleAfter: orchestrates every step of your customer's journey.

steps.title: Meta Ads → Lead captured
steps.description: Lead clicks the ad, data enters yapt. automatically via Meta webhook. Zero manual entry.

steps.title: AI qualifies in seconds
steps.description: YaBot analyzes profile, history, and context. Classifies the lead before any human touches it.

steps.title: Intelligent distribution
steps.description: YaFlow routes to the right salesperson based on rules, availability, and expertise.

steps.title: Conversation with full context
steps.description: The salesperson receives the lead with a complete profile: source, interest, score, and AI-suggested approach.

steps.title: Automatic follow-up
steps.description: YaBot sends personalized follow-ups at the right time. No more leads going cold.

steps.title: Assisted negotiation
steps.description: AI suggests next steps, detects objections, and recommends offers based on success patterns.

steps.title: Deal closed
steps.description: Pipeline updated automatically. Conversion metrics in real time.

steps.title: Intelligent post-sale
steps.description: Supermemory ensures the customer never has to repeat anything. Expansion and retention powered by AI.

problem.label: The Reality
problem.title: You already live this. Every day.
problem.card1Text: Your client wants AI on WhatsApp. You recommend a generic tool — someone else harvests what you planted.
problem.card2Text: They lose sales from lack of follow-up. Leads go cold, opportunities die. You see it and can't fix it.
problem.card3Text: They invest in Meta Ads and don't know what became a conversation. Money without tracking is a seed thrown to the wind.
problem.card4Text: You configure, train the team, fix the bugs. Work for free — and the MRR goes to someone else's account.
problem.card5Text: Conversational AI grows 40% per year. Every client that passes through you without a solution, another partner plants.

turn.title: What if every referral became a harvest — and you were the partner who brought the innovation?
turn.text1: Imagine earning recurring commission for every client you bring. Every month. As long as they use the platform.
turn.text2: Even better: charge for implementation, training, follow-up — and still earn recurring on top. Every client becomes a tree that bears fruit for you. Every month.
turn.card1Text: Be seen as an innovation reference. The partner who brought the solution that works.
turn.card2Text: Commission every month, as long as the client uses it. Plant once, harvest always.
turn.card3Text: Get called for more projects. Satisfied clients refer you.

pains.intro: You told us that {{company}}'s clients face:

slow.painDesc: Clients wait hours for a reply. Leads go cold. Sales are lost.

sales.painDesc: Lead came in, nobody called. 5 minutes later, cold. Sale lost.
sales.solutionDesc: Fires at the right time, qualifies, and schedules meetings. Zero forgotten leads.

ai_bad.painDesc: Dumb bot that understands nothing. Client gets annoyed, gives up, goes to the competitor.
ai_bad.solutionDesc: Not a rules-based chatbot. Real intelligence that learns, remembers, and evolves.

no_ai.painDesc: Everything manual. Team replies one by one, makes mistakes, falls behind. Competitors with AI move ahead.
no_ai.solutionDesc: From zero to configured AI in hours. Specialized agents, 3 modes, 40+ actions. No code.

no_attribution.pain: No idea where the lead came from

no_attribution.solutionDesc: Tracks from click to closed deal. Attribution per conversation. Real ROI per campaign.

no_automation.painDesc: Team does everything by hand. Copy, paste, send. Human error, rework, high cost.
no_automation.solutionDesc: Drag-and-drop editor. 13 nodes, 9 triggers, zero code. Anyone can build it.

fragmented.pain: Tools that don't talk to each other

fragmented.solutionDesc: Chat, AI, CRM, automation, analytics. One login, one intelligence, one view.

volume.solutionDesc: Smart distribution. AI handles the repetitive. Humans focus on what converts.

cta.successMessage:
🌱 Welcome to the yapt. partner program!

You'll receive an email with the next steps shortly.

meta.title: Intelligent Automations
meta.description: Create conversational experiences and internal automations with AI, SuperMemory and native WhatsApp Flows.

hero.title:
Automations that think.
Experiences that convert.
hero.subtitle: 33 node types, 15 triggers, parallel execution and orchestrated AI. Build flows that understand context, remember the past and act with intelligence.

builder.subtitle: yaFlows Builder
builder.title: A builder that thinks with you
builder.description: Visual drag & drop editor with 33 node types across 6 categories. Connect triggers, AI, CRM actions, conditional logic and communication on an intuitive canvas — no code required.
features: 33 node types: AI, communication, data, logic, CRM and integrations
Drag & drop with visual connections and real-time validation
Ready-made templates for the most common scenarios
Test before publishing with dry-run mode
Analytics overlay: see each node's performance directly on the canvas

dualExperience.subtitle: Two Experiences, One Builder
dualExperience.title: Conversations and internal automations in one place
dualExperience.description: Create conversational experiences (lead replies, AI processes, WhatsApp responds) and internal automations (timer fires, fetch data, update CRM) — all in the same visual builder.
features: Conversational experiences: respond to leads with real-time AI
Internal automations: send active messages, move pipeline, update tags
Mix both in the same flow: conversation + backend action
Various triggers: message, keyword, tag, deal stage, timer, webhook

superMemory.subtitle: SuperMemory in Automations
superMemory.title: AI never forgets
superMemory.description: Every flow the lead went through, every response, every preference — everything is saved in SuperMemory and automatically available in the next flows. AI has eternal context.
features: Persistent context across different flows
AI knows what was already said, offered and negotiated
Facts extracted automatically: budget, objections, stakeholders
Per-lead memory: each contact has their complete history
Zero configuration: works automatically in every flow

multiAI.subtitle: Multi-AI per Experience
multiAI.title: More than one intelligence in the same flow
multiAI.description: Combine classification, generation and data extraction in the same conversational experience. Each AI node can use the ideal model for its specific task.
features: Classification: AI analyzes intent and sentiment
Generation: AI responds with context and personality
Extraction: AI captures structured data from conversation
Each node can use a different model (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini)
Chain multiple AIs for more precise results

integrations.subtitle: External Data & Integrations
integrations.title: Connect your flows to the world
integrations.description: Inbound and outbound webhooks, REST APIs, Zapier and sub-flows. Bring external data to enrich the experience and send results to any system.
features: Inbound webhooks: receive events from any system
Outbound webhooks: notify external systems in real time
REST APIs: connect to any endpoint with advanced filters
Sub-flows: break complex automations into reusable modules
Zapier: integrate with 5,000+ apps with no code

waFlows.subtitle: WhatsApp Flows
waFlows.title: Native interactive experiences on WhatsApp
waFlows.description: Create forms, surveys, scheduling and interactive journeys directly on WhatsApp — without leaving the conversation. Visual builder with 20 native Meta components.
features: 20 native Meta components (inputs, selects, calendars, etc.)
Real-time preview inside WhatsApp
Multi-step forms with validation
Direct integration with the automation flow
Meta JSON v6.0 generated automatically

grid.title: Everything you need to automate with intelligence

parallel.title: Parallel Execution
parallel.description: Nodes that can run simultaneously are executed in parallel, maximizing speed.

dryRun.title: Dry-Run (Test)
dryRun.description: Simulate your entire flow before publishing. See each step without affecting real data.

reentry.title: Configurable Re-entry
reentry.description: Define if the lead can re-enter: once, with cooldown or always. Total control.

rateLimit.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimit.description: Limit how many times a contact can enter the same flow per period.

absorption.title: Event Absorption
absorption.description: Active flows consume the message before the router — no conflicts between automations.

templates.title: Ready-made Templates
templates.description: 6 templates for the most common scenarios: welcome, qualification, scheduling and more.

meta.title: Sales & Pipeline — yapt.
meta.description: From qualified lead to closed deal. Visual pipeline, AI qualification, real-time coaching and proposals via WhatsApp.

hero.title: From qualified lead to closed deal. No spreadsheets.
hero.subtitle: yapt. combines AI, visual pipeline and real-time coaching to turn conversations into revenue. Every lead qualified, every deal tracked, every proposal followed up.

painPoints.title: Your team sells via WhatsApp, but struggles with this every day...

noFollowUp.title: Leads go cold without follow-up
noFollowUp.description: Sales rep takes 2h to respond and the lead already bought from a competitor. Without prioritization, everyone loses.

invisiblePipeline.title: Invisible pipeline
invisiblePipeline.description: Deals in the rep's head, on sticky notes, in spreadsheets. Manager doesn't know the real forecast.

feelingQualification.title: Gut-feeling qualification
feelingQualification.description: Rep spends 1h with a cold lead and ignores the hot lead who messaged 3x. No score, no criteria.

noCoaching.title: No coaching
noCoaching.description: Rep fumbles an objection and nobody corrects in real time. Training only happens in Friday's meeting.

deals.subtitle: yaDeals
deals.title: Visual pipeline. Every deal tracked from WhatsApp to revenue.
deals.description: Drag-and-drop Kanban with multi-pipeline, stakeholders, linked products and SLA per stage. Know exactly where each deal stands, why it's stuck and when it will close. Integrated with every conversation — the deal is born from the conversation.
features: Visual Kanban with drag-and-drop between stages
Multi-pipeline: sales, onboarding, CS — each with its own stages
Stakeholders: link multiple contacts to the same deal
SLA per stage: alerts when a deal is stuck too long
Win/Loss analysis: understand why deals are won or lost

qualification.subtitle: Smart Qualification
qualification.title: Train the AI with your questions. It qualifies each lead automatically.
qualification.description: Choose your methodology (BANT, SPIN, MEDDIC, Challenger or custom), set up your questions with weight and criteria, and define thresholds. The AI extracts answers directly from the conversation and calculates the score. When the lead hits the right point — it becomes a deal automatically.
features: 6 methodologies: BANT, SPIN, MEDDIC, GPCT, Challenger or Custom
Set up your questions with weight (1-5) and criteria by type
Visual thresholds: Lead → MQL → SQL → Opportunity
ICP mode: describe your ideal customer and the AI evaluates semantically
Hybrid score: 7 behavioral factors + AI qualification

playbooks.subtitle: Playbooks
playbooks.title: Codify your methodology. The entire team executes the same way.
playbooks.description: Build your playbook in 5 steps: product, qualification, pipeline, objections and buying signals. yaMentor is trained on the playbook and guides each rep in real time. Junior gets full script. Senior gets bullet points. Everyone sells on standard.
features: 5-step wizard: product, qualification, pipeline, situations, review
Objections mapped with ideal response per scenario
Buying signals + recommended action
Connected to yaMentor — AI trained on your playbook
Rep level: Junior (full script) → Senior (bullet points)

mentor.subtitle: yaMentor
mentor.title: Real-time coaching. The AI whispers the right play.
mentor.description: While the rep is chatting, the Mentor suggests the next action based on the playbook, the lead's history and the conversation moment. Ready response, objection handled, red flag detected — all in real time, without interrupting the flow.
features: Response suggestion based on active playbook
Objection detection + recommended response
Red flags: frustration, prolonged silence, cancellation threat
Configurable style: Direct, Encouraging or Socratic
Next actions: "Create deal", "Send proposal", "Schedule call"

proposals.subtitle: Proposals
proposals.title: Proposal via WhatsApp. Client accepts on mobile.
proposals.description: Send proposals via direct link on WhatsApp. The client opens on mobile, sees everything formatted, and accepts online. Tracking: viewed, time on page, when accepted. No PDF, no email, no middleman.
features: Proposal template builder (title, description, price, terms)
Public link — client opens and accepts on mobile
Tracking: views, time on site, clicks, acceptances
Integrated with Deals — proposal linked to the deal
Versioning: proposal v1, v2, v3 with history

contacts.subtitle: Contacts 360
contacts.title: Each lead as a living database.
contacts.description: 360 view of each contact: lifecycle stage, lead score with breakdown, emotion trends, associated deals, activities, proposals and campaign attribution. The rep never asks 'who is this lead?' again — everything is right there.
features: Lifecycle: visitor → lead → MQL → SQL → opportunity → customer
Score with visual breakdown (7 factors + AI)
Emotion trends: latest messages with sentiment
Deals, proposals and activities linked
Campaign attribution: where they came from (Google, Meta, direct)

calendar.subtitle: Calendar & Activities
calendar.title: Synced calendar. Every action logged.
calendar.description: Bidirectional Google Calendar sync with multi-seller view. Activities Hub tracks calls, meetings, tasks and emails — all linked to the deal. My Day shows today's tasks. Manager knows exactly what each rep did.
features: Automatic bidirectional Google Calendar sync
Multi-seller view: see the entire team's calendar
Activities Hub: tasks, calls, meetings with duration and notes
My Day: today's tasks to complete
Everything linked to the deal and the contact

autoDeal.subtitle: Pipeline Automation
autoDeal.title: Lead qualified? Deal created. Team notified.
autoDeal.description: Set the trigger stage (MQL, SQL or Opportunity) and the deal is created automatically in the pipeline. Real-time email notifications: deal won, proposal accepted, lead qualified, AI handoff. Each event with configurable recipients.
features: Auto-deal: lead reaches score → deal created in pipeline automatically
3 triggers: by lifecycle stage, by score threshold, or via Flow
Notifications: deal won/lost, proposal accepted, auto-deal created
Configurable recipients: owner, admins or custom team
Smart handoff: AI escalates to human with reason (frustration, high value)

timeline.title: From conversation to revenue. Every step connected.
timeline.subtitle: Lead arrives, AI qualifies, deal is created, proposal sent, sale closed — all automatic, all tracked.

steps.title: Conversation
steps.description: Lead arrives via WhatsApp. yaveh AI answers, understands context and starts qualification.

steps.title: AI Qualifies
steps.description: Playbook questions extracted automatically. BANT, SPIN or custom methodology.

steps.title: Score
steps.description: Hybrid Lead Score: 7 behavioral factors + AI qualification. Threshold reached = SQL.

steps.title: Deal
steps.description: Deal created automatically in the pipeline. Sales rep notified with full context.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.description: Proposal sent via WhatsApp link. Client opens on mobile and accepts online.

steps.title: Sale
steps.description: Deal closed. Conversion sent to Meta/Google via CAPI. Closed loop.

grid.title: Every detail designed to sell more

scoring.title: Hybrid Lead Scoring
scoring.description: 7 behavioral factors + AI qualification combined in a single score.

methodology.title: BANT / SPIN / MEDDIC
methodology.description: Configurable methodology per agent. Choose what makes sense for your team.

icp.title: ICP Matching
icp.description: Describe your ideal customer — AI evaluates each lead semantically.

multiPipeline.title: Multi-Pipeline
multiPipeline.description: Sales, onboarding, CS — each with its own stages and SLA.

sla.title: SLA per Stage
sla.description: Alert when a deal is stuck too long. Never lose a deal due to inaction again.

winLoss.title: Win/Loss Analysis
winLoss.description: Understand why deals are won or lost. Improve the process.

emotion.title: Emotion Engine
emotion.description: 13 emotional signals integrated into the score and visible in the deal.

proposalTracking.title: Proposal Tracking
proposalTracking.description: Views, time on page, clicks and acceptances — all tracked.

handlerState.title: Handler State
handlerState.description: Bot ↔ Human without duplicate messages. Clean transition.

myDay.title: My Day
myDay.description: Today's tasks for the rep in 1 screen. Total focus.

lifecycle.title: Automatic Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: Visitor → Lead → MQL → SQL → Opportunity — automatic progression.

autoDeal.title: Deal Auto-Create
autoDeal.description: Lead qualified → deal created automatically in the pipeline.
